data.title: OpenAI Enhances ChatGPT with Memory Feature for Personalized Responses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI has announced the rollout of an enhanced memory feature for ChatGPT, available to all Plus and Pro users starting today. This feature allows the AI to reference past conversations to deliver more personalized responses, catering to users' preferences and interests. Users have the option to disable the memory feature or opt out of referencing past chats entirely in the settings. This enhancement aims to improve the utility of ChatGPT in writing, advice, and learning applications.

data.title: Particle Lianchuang: Individuals purchased over $3.2 million of PARTI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Particle Lianchuang posted on the X platform that he personally purchased more than 3.2 million US dollars of PARTI, with an average cost of 0.246 USDT, totaling about 13 million pieces.

data.title: Prompt briefly hit 0.22 USDT, possibly due to its listing on Coinbase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain data shows that perhaps affected by the listing on Coinbase, PROMPT briefly touched 0.22 USDT and is currently trading at 0.2107 USDT.

data.title: Australian Government Tests Blockchain for Age Verification and Social Media Restriction
data.description:
ShareRing, a Melbourne-based blockchain company, has been approved by the Australian government to roll out an age verification chain as part of a plan to restrict social media access for younger persons. ShareRing will create a pilot version of the blockchain with school students from Darwin, Northern Territory. The blockchain will allow users to prove […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/australian-government-tests-blockchain-for-age-verification-and-social-media-restriction/

data.title: Ripple’s XRP To Hit $12.5 Before End Of President Trump’s Second Term, Standard Chartered Says
data.description:
British multinational bank Standard Chartered made an ambitious prediction: It expects Ripple-promoted cryptocurrency XRP to reach $12. 5 before the end of Donald Trump’s second term as U. S. president
source: https://zycrypto.com/ripples-xrp-to-hit-12-5-before-end-of-president-trumps-second-term-standard-chartered-says/

data.title: Trump vs. China: How does the trade war affect Bitcoin?
data.description:
BTC's downtrend momentum could end soon, but it depends on U. S. -China potential tariff deal.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/trump-vs-china-what-does-the-tariff-war-mean-for-bitcoin/

data.title: Coinbase to launch PROMPT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase announced that it will launch Wayfinder (PROMPT) on the Base network. 
Note: PROMPT is deployed on the Ethereum mainnet and Base, and Coinbase only supports Base.

data.title: Portofino Technologies CFO Mark Blackborough Resigns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mark Blackborough, the Chief Financial Officer of cryptocurrency market maker Portofino Technologies, has recently resigned from his position, as reported by CoinDesk.

data.title: What’s next for Shiba Inu as Shibarium celebrates 1 billion transactions?
data.description:
Shiba Inu price volatility persists as the SHI stablecoin launch is delayed by regulations. Shibarium hit 1B transactions, signaling robust adoption. Shibarium plans to integrate Rollups and FHE for scalability and privacy
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/whats-next-for-shiba-inu-as-shibarium-celebrates-1-billion-transactions/

data.title: Bull Trap Ahead? Bitcoin Rally at Risk Amid China Tariff Fallout
data.description:
QCP Capital warns that the Bitcoin rally above $82,700 may be a classic bull trap, as escalating US-China trade tensions and potential yuan devaluation threaten market stability.

The post Bull Trap Ahead? Bitcoin Rally at Risk Amid China Tariff Fallout first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/10/bitcoin-rally-might-be-bull-trap/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bitcoin-rally-might-be-bull-trap
